Video.summary: Explore English history from the fall of the Roman Empire to the Tudor dynasty.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: From Britannia to Britain

Video.summary: Examine evidence as to whether an unidentified champion could have been King Arthur.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: Roman Britain and the Origins of King Arthur

Image.alt: Roman Britain and the Origins of King Arthur
Roman Britain and the Origins of King Arthur
Roman Britain and the Origins of King Arthur

Video.summary: See how the victories of a shadowy figure offered only temporary stability.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: The Early Anglo-Saxon Kingdoms

Video.summary: Follow the story of the conversion of the Anglo-Saxons to Christianity.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: The Conversion of the Anglo-Saxons

Video.summary: Plunge into the substance of daily life for Anglo-Saxons of all social levels.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: Work and Faith in Anglo-Saxon England

Image.alt: Work and Faith in Anglo-Saxon England
Work and Faith in Anglo-Saxon England
Work and Faith in Anglo-Saxon England

Video.summary: Watch as the one- or two-boat raids grew into vast armies of 50 ships or more.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: The Viking Invasions

Video.summary: Explore the career of Alfred the Great, who kept Wessex free of Viking control.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: Alfred the Great

Video.summary: Grasp how the Anglo-Saxon state became perhaps the most successful in Christian Europe.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Story of Medieval England: From King Arthur to the Tudor Conquest
Video.title: The Government of Anglo-Saxon England

Video.summary: Why was the Early-Modern period crucial not only to England but to transatlantic civilization itself?
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of England from the Tudors to the Stuarts
Video.title: England 1485 - 1714, the First Modern Country

Video.summary: Examine England's complicated relationship to Europe and the Celtic lands of Scotland, Ireland, and Wales.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of England from the Tudors to the Stuarts
Video.title: The Land and Its People in 1485 - I

Image.alt: The Land and Its People in 1485 - I
The Land and Its People in 1485 - I
The Land and Its People in 1485 - I

Video.summary: Look at the material and social topography of the English town, manor, and village.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of England from the Tudors to the Stuarts
Video.title: The Land and Its People in 1485 - II

Image.alt: The Land and Its People in 1485 - II
The Land and Its People in 1485 - II
The Land and Its People in 1485 - II

Video.summary: Consider the mental landscape of the English people'and the concept of the "Great Chain of Being."
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of England from the Tudors to the Stuarts
Video.title: The Land and Its People in 1485 - III

Image.alt: The Land and Its People in 1485 - III
The Land and Its People in 1485 - III
The Land and Its People in 1485 - III

Video.summary: The English monarchy and constitution underwent over a century of instability prior to the Tudors.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of England from the Tudors to the Stuarts
Video.title: Medieval Prelude - 1377 - 1455

Video.summary: Over 30 years, the Lancastrian and Yorkist claimants to the throne fought three different Wars of the Roses.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of England from the Tudors to the Stuarts
Video.title: Medieval Prelude - 1455 - 85

Video.summary: This episode examines the steps taken by Henry VII to secure the crown after his victory over Richard III.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of England from the Tudors to the Stuarts
Video.title: Establishing the Tudor Dynasty - 1485 - 97

Video.summary: Examine Henry's efforts to make government more efficient, less expensive, and more responsive to his wishes.
Video.grandparentTitle: A History of England from the Tudors to the Stuarts
Video.title: Establishing the Tudor Dynasty - 1497 - 1509

Video.summary: Britain during the age of Queen Victoria embodies the modern paradoxes with which we still deal.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The Victorian Paradox

Video.summary: The teenage girl who ascended the throne upon her uncle's death had never expected to become queen.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: Victoria's Early Reign - 1837-1861

Video.summary: Political stability and improved farming methods helped make Britain the world's first industrial country.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The Industrial Revolution - 1750-1830

Video.summary: Where were the first railways in Britain built? What other advances in transport did they help lead to?
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: Railways and Steamships

Video.summary: The Reform Act of 1832 abolished many old constituencies'and created new ones.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: Parliamentary Reform and Chartism

Video.summary: Courtship, marriage, and motherhood were central for women from the higher classes.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The Upper- and Middle-Class Woman

Video.summary: The stark contrasts in Victorian life are apparent in the lives of the poorer majority of women.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The Working-Class Woman

Video.summary: Britain's established church faced diverse challenges from new ideas and social conditions.
Video.grandparentTitle: Victorian Britain
Video.title: The State Church and Evangelical Revival

Image.alt: The State Church and Evangelical Revival
The State Church and Evangelical Revival
The State Church and Evangelical Revival
